description: Adult milestone birthday party at restaurant

input.subject: 🎉 Surprise! You're Invited to Mark's 40th Birthday Bash!
input.body_text:
SHHH! It's a SURPRISE!

You're invited to celebrate Mark's 40th birthday!

Please join us for dinner and drinks:

Date: Friday, March 6th, 2026
Time: 7:30 PM
Place: The Capital Grille
       150 E 42nd Street
       New York, NY 10017

IMPORTANT: Please arrive by 7:00 PM - Mark will arrive at 7:30!

Dress code: Smart casual
RSVP: jennifer.wilson@outlook.com by Feb 28th

P.S. Don't tell Mark! 🤫

Jennifer

events.title: Mark's 40th Birthday Party
events.location: The Capital Grille, 150 E 42nd Street, New York, NY 10017

notes: Surprise party with arrival time different from event time - should use event start time
